message:
feat(ws-event-log): add automated cleanup job with retention policies

Implement background cleanup for ws_event_log table to prevent unbounded
growth and maintain performance:

Cleanup configuration (via env vars):
- WS_EVENT_LOG_RETENTION_HOURS: TTL for events (default: 24h)
- WS_EVENT_LOG_MAX_ROWS: Hard cap on total rows (default: 200,000)
- WS_EVENT_LOG_MAX_DELETE_PER_RUN: Max deletions per cleanup (default: 5,000)
- WS_EVENT_LOG_DELETE_BATCH_SIZE: Batch size for deletes (default: 500)

Cleanup strategy (runs every 60s):
1. Delete events older than retention period (age-based)
2. Trim oldest events when row count exceeds maxRows (size-based)

Batched deletes prevent long-running transactions and reduce lock
contention during normal operation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
